windows.player_beat: Spawn in Rookguard, read the first objective, and step onto the movement rune without the client choosing the result.
Use local chat once, see it broadcast nearby, and understand chat is server-readable proof for the tutorial.
sim_frame_labels: Newcomer sends first accountable chat signal
Rookguard chat lesson is marked complete

windows.player_beat: Step onto the Tem marker, receive the friendly challenge, and answer it through chat.
sim_frame_labels: Tem challenge is issued in the safe corridor
Tem answer passes and the tutorial step closes
Rookguard Tem lesson is marked complete

windows.player_beat: Visit the runestone table, trigger one server-rolled result, and see that it grants flavor rather than power.
sim_frame_labels: Runestone table gives a harmless public roll

windows.player_beat: Find the legend stone and learn that some world objects record attention without giving loot.
sim_frame_labels: Legend stone sighting teaches refusal without loot

windows.player_beat: Defeat the training slime, declare a Heroes Codex vocation in the guild hall, then finish Rookguard cleanly.
sim_frame_labels: Training slime practice proves starter combat
Training slime loot is minted before pickup
Newcomer declares a Heroes Codex vocation
Newcomer returns to the gate with tutorial, training, and Codex proof
